task_name: FLS Trainer Box Assembly & Setup Guide
reason: Video is instructional/educational content showing FLS equipment setup and assembly, with on-screen text overlays ('Assemble the Trainer Box', 'Connect the Adjustable LED Light', 'Attach the White Holder', 'Add the Adjuster', 'Connect Endoscope Camera to Computer', 'Turn on Additional Lights', 'Place and Secure Practice Modules', 'Use Mobile Devices as Displays', 'For Module Usage, Refer to the Instruction Video') and hands demonstrating assembly steps. This is NOT a performance of an FLS task by a trainee or expert attempting task completion.
video_content_summary: Instructional video demonstrating assembly and setup of an FLS MISTELS trainer box, including: unboxing components, assembling the white trainer platform with blue pegs/modules and red connectors, installing LED adjustable lighting, attaching endoscope camera to laptop, installing practice modules (peg transfer pegs visible), and configuring the system for training use.

demonstrated_techniques: System configuration for video display and training
verbal_cues: For Module Usage, Refer to the Instruction Video
common_errors_addressed: Proper order of assembly to ensure stability
Secure mounting of practice modules to prevent movement during tasks

confidence_rationale: Video classification is certain—clear on-screen text labels, sequential setup instructions, and assembly demonstration are unambiguous indicators of instructional content. This is equipment setup documentation, not task performance evaluation.
